Send Us a Message

Find Us on Map

UGIP Nainital is located in Mallital, Nainital — nestled in the beautiful Kumaon Hills of Uttarakhand.

How to Reach

Nearest railway station: Kathgodam (35 km). Regular buses and taxis are available from Haldwani and Kathgodam directly to Nainital.
